payload.description: Published when a shopping cart in the webshop application has been inactive for a defined period without completing checkout.
payload.title: CartAbandoned

lastActiveStep.description: Last checkout step the customer reached before abandoning the cart

cartId.description: Unique identifier of the abandoned cart

customerId.description: Identifier of the customer, null if the cart belongs to a guest session

cartValue.description: Total monetary value of the cart at the time of abandonment

itemCount.description: Number of distinct items in the cart at the time of abandonment

payload.description: Published when a new customer account is created in the webshop application.
payload.title: AccountRegistered

customerSegment.description: Business segment the customer is classified into at registration

customerId.description: Unique identifier of the newly created customer account

email.description: Email address used for the account

marketingOptIn.description: Whether the customer consented to marketing communications during registration

payload.description: Published when a customer successfully completes checkout in the webshop application.
payload.title: OrderPlaced

totalAmount.description: Total monetary value of the order, including shipping, excluding any later refunds

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the placed order

shippingMethod.description: Shipping method selected by the customer at checkout

customerId.description: Identifier of the customer, null if the order was placed as a guest

currency.description: Currency in which the order was placed

items.description: Line items included in the order

sku.description: Stock keeping unit identifying the purchased product

payload.description: Published when an order in the webshop application has been cancelled.
payload.title: OrderCancelled

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the cancelled order

refundAmount.description: Amount refunded to the customer as a result of the cancellation, 0 if no payment had been captured

payload.description: Published when a customer initiates a return for a previously placed order in the webshop application.
payload.title: ReturnRequested

orderId.description: Identifier of the order this return relates to

itemsReturned.description: Line items included in the return request

sku.description: Stock keeping unit identifying the returned product

returnId.description: Unique identifier of the return request

refundAmount.description: Amount to be refunded once the return is processed, 0 if not yet determined

payload.description: Received from the payment gateway when an authorization decision has been made for an order's payment.
payload.title: PaymentAuthorized

orderId.description: Identifier of the order this payment is associated with

paymentId.description: Unique identifier of the payment authorization attempt
